title: PUBLIC SHOWERS, CLOTHING CLOSET, HYGIENE SUPPLIES, BEDDING - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL ROSEBURG PUBLIC SHOWERS, CLOTHING CLOSET, HYGIENE SUPPLIES, BEDDING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers public showers. Also may provide a clothing closet, hygiene packages, and bedding. Donations are welcome. 630 W Stanton Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Showers: Tuesday/Thursday 3pm-5pm Clothing closet: 3rd Tuesday of the month 3:30pm-5pm Bedding, and hygiene packages: Monday/Wednesday 10am-2pm Email (541) 580-0680 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 580-0680 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Dillard, Glide, Roseburg, and Winston TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on ground floor Services: Bedding/Linen Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs General Clothing Provision Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Showers/Baths Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL ROSEBURG
